title: aster houghtonii
intro: Aster houghtonii, also known as Houghton's Aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountains of northern China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aster houghtonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Aster houghtonii are typically made by infusing the leaves or flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
